query: SELECT id, name, email, cpf, turmaId, trilhaId, programId FROM alunos WHERE name LIKE '%Vera%Braga%' OR name LIKE '%Fabio%' OR name LIKE '%Fábio%' OR name LIKE '%Carolina%' ORDER BY name
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT id, name, email, cpf, turmaId, trilhaId, programId FROM alunos WHERE name LIKE '%Vera%Braga%' OR name LIKE '%Fabio%' OR name LIKE '%Fábio%' OR name LIKE '%Carolina%' ORDER BY name
